evidence_rows.reading: The phase selected one clean pilot family and archetype instead of mixing multiple carry grammars.
The phase froze one-cycle training inputs, labels, and validation rules without leaking into execution or deployment.

interpretation: V1.12 has done its job once the first one-cycle experiment is sharply defined.
The next legal move is not immediate model deployment but bounded pilot data assembly under the frozen protocol.
This phase should now close rather than expand into multi-object training by default.
